title: rhododendron × phoeniceum var. calycinum
intro: Rhododendron × phoeniceum var. calycinum, also known as the calycinum, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The calycinum plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The calycinum plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
